overall.description: Nighttime drive through a tropical rural road in a video game setting (resembling Far Cry 6), featuring palm trees, rocky cliffs, passing vehicles including a blue pickup and military trucks, road signage, and ending with a view of the moon. The scene is illuminated by street lamps and moonlight with a blue-green color palette.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal road with rocky cliff and construction barrier

events.description: blue pickup truck with headlights on passes by in the opposite direction
parked motorcycle becomes visible on the left roadside

agents.ego_description: driving forward along the rural road, passing a blue truck and approaching a parked motorcycle

notable_agents.action: blue pickup truck driving past in the opposite direction with headlights on
motorcycle parked on the grassy roadside

red mesh construction barrier attached to the cliff side
tall palm trees lining the left side of the road
wooden utility pole with street lamp illuminating the road
two-lane asphalt road with visible tire tracks

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a narrow coastal road flanked by a rocky cliff with red construction fencing on the right and palm trees on the left. Street lamps cast pools of yellow light on the asphalt. A blue pickup truck passes by in the opposite direction, and a parked motorcycle sits on the left verge as the camera continues driving forward.

events.description: vehicle with headlights on passes in the opposite direction
large illuminated billboard becomes visible in the distance on the right

agents.ego_description: continuing along the open road, passing another vehicle and approaching a distant billboard

notable_agents.action: car with headlights on driving in the opposite direction

entered.detail: large rectangular billboard with bright red and white illumination visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The road opens up into a wider rural stretch with sparse palm trees. The rocky cliff and construction barrier recede behind as an illuminated billboard appears in the distance on the right. Another vehicle passes by, and the camera continues driving through the lamp-lit darkness toward the distant lights of a settlement.

scene_state.functional_zone: road intersection approach with directional signage

events.description: large blue road sign reading 'MOGOTE LAPIDA / COSTA VACIA' becomes visible on the right
approaching intersection with visible cross traffic and military vehicles

agents.ego_description: approaching a road intersection, passing a large directional sign for Mogote Lapida and Costa Vacia

entered.detail: large blue road sign with white text indicating directions to Mogote Lapida and Costa Vacia
road intersection with crossing traffic visible ahead

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches an intersection marked by a prominent blue directional sign for Mogote Lapida and Costa Vacia. The illuminated billboard is now close on the right, and the road widens as the camera nears the crossing where other vehicles are visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: road intersection with military presence transitioning to sky view

events.description: military jeep and truck visible at the intersection, turning onto the road
camera tilts upward to focus on the moon and night sky

agents.ego_description: driving through the intersection past military vehicles, then tilting the camera up to view the moon

notable_agents.action: military jeep turning at the intersection with soldiers visible
military truck driving through the intersection

entered.detail: yellow triangular yield warning sign on a pole
bright full moon visible in the night sky

segments.scene_description: The camera drives through the intersection where military vehicles are turning. After passing the yield sign and military trucks, the camera tilts upward to reveal the full moon and starry night sky, ending the clip with a view of the clouds and moon above the rural landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive along a tropical coastal road that transitions from a narrow, cliffside passage into an open rural intersection under a moonlit sky. It begins on a tight stretch of asphalt flanked by a rocky cliff and red construction fencing, passing a blue pickup truck and a parked motorcycle beneath the yellow glow of street lamps. As the road opens into a wider rural expanse, the cliffs recede and the camera moves toward the distant lights of a settlement and a glowing billboard. The scene then shifts toward a prominent blue directional sign for Mogote Lapida and Costa Vacia as the camera approaches a busy crossing. Finally, after driving through the intersection past several military vehicles, the camera tilts upward away from the road to reveal a bright full moon and starry sky drifting behind thin clouds.
